summary: AppointmentDetail refactoring testing complete. Page successfully decomposed from 1633 lines into 8 files (~280 lines orchestrator + 7 sub-components). All features working correctly at 375px mobile viewport. Page height reduced from ~4 screens to 1.4 screens. No horizontal overflow. Both <details> elements collapsed by default. Desktop regression passed at 1280px.

issues: Minor: edit-general-info-btn (pencil icon) is 26x26px, below 44px touch target - acceptable for secondary action
Minor: resend-detail-btn (refresh icon) is 24x24px, below 44px touch target - acceptable for secondary action

context_for_next_testing_agent: AppointmentDetail page refactored from 1633 lines to 8 files. Main orchestrator ~280 lines. Sub-components: AppointmentHeader, AppointmentEssentials, EngagementSummary, FinancialBreakdown, ParticipantsSection, SecondaryActions, CancelModal.
